info.name: v9
info.description:
进行了光影和结构上的fing-tuning，算是进行了一些小的优化，但是在较小分辨率下的肢体还是会暴露一些问题，疑是ft之后信息过密导致的

The fine-tuning of light and shadow and structure is considered to have made some minor optimizations, but the limbs at smaller resolutions will still expose some problems, which are suspected to be caused by too dense information after FT

v6推荐使用的提示词（懒人版）

Recommended prompt words for v6（Lazy version）

POSITIVE：best quality,amazing quality,very

aesthetic,absurdres,masterpiece,

NEGATIVE：bad feet,missing toes,extra toes,lowres,bad anatomy,bad hands,text,error,missing fingers,extra digit,fewer digits,cropped,worst quality,low quality,normal quality,jpeg artifacts,signature,watermark,username,blurry,4-koma,sketch,(bad:1.05),error,fewer,extra,missing,worst quality,jpeg artifacts,bad quality,watermark,unfinished,displeasing,chromatic aberration,signature,extra digits,artistic error,username,scan,abstract,(blurry, lowres, low quality:1.1),ugly,(big head, bad anatomy:1.05),artist name,(watermark:1.1),

v1只是一个初步进行微调的版本，但是效果好的惊人。在动漫绘画的领域比pony的微调效果要好上不少，肢体的正确率也十分可观。希望各位能多多测试一下这个微调。

基于illustrious-xl Illustrious-XL - v0.1 | Stable Diffusion XL Checkpoint | Civitai

V1 just a preliminary version with fine-tuning, but the results are surprisingly good. In the field of anime painting, the fine-tuning effect is much better than Pony's, and the accuracy of body movements is also considerable. I hope everyone can test this fine-tuning and give some comments about it.

base on illustrious-xl Illustrious-XL - v0.1 | Stable Diffusion XL Checkpoint | Civitai

训练须知：

v1版本使用了100张经过筛选的高质量的使用nai3生成的图片，以及画风相近的一些公开素材作为姿势的补充，训练使用了prodigy算法进行训练。illustrious模型的女性素材很多，导致了模型会比较难以生成男性的图像，而且某些时候需要一些比较复杂的提示词才能生成目标图像，这将在之后的更多训练集的版本尝试进行一些改善。

Training instructions:

The v1 version used 100 high-quality images generated using Nai3 that had been filtered, as well as some publicly available materials with similar art styles as pose supplements. The training was conducted using the "prodigy" to train. The illustrious model has a lot of female materials, which makes it difficult for the model to generate male images, and sometimes requires some complex prompt words to generate target images. This will be improved in more training set versions in the future.

在v4中，我使用了600张由nai3生成的风格图片作为默认画风的训练，这一步是基于illustrious模型的，然后我用模型融合的方法在这一fine-tuning后的模型上加入了一些noob的模型成分，以来平衡illu的一些缺失的语义和识别prompt的能力。

In v4, I used 600 style images generated by nai3 as the default art style for training. This step was based on the illustrious model, and then I added some noob model components to this fine tuned model using model fusion to balance some of Illu's missing semantics and prompt recognition ability.

v6这个版本的模型进行了更好的画风调教，改善了大量的基于ntrv4的错误肢体和过拟合的画风，并调整了过细的线条，让整体的线条和效果更好，甚至配合画师提示词使用已经足以媲美nai3，在某些画面构图上已经超越了nai3

推荐使用的提示词都在例图里面，总体来说ntr模型系列的提示词都可以直接使用，这将是一个新的开始，往后会不断强化这个版本

This version v6 of the model has undergone better art style tuning, improving a large number of erroneous limbs and overfitting styles based on ntrv4, and adjusting overly fine lines to make the overall lines and effects better. Even when used in conjunction with artist prompts, it is already comparable to nai3 and has surpassed nai3 in some picture compositions、

The recommended prompt words are all in the example image. Overall, the prompt words of the ntr model series can be directly used, which will be a new beginning and will be continuously strengthened in the future

推荐使用质量词Recommend quality words

正面提示词

best quality,amazing quality,very aesthetic,absurdres,beast quality,masterpiece,artist:xxx

负面提示词

lowres, bad anatomy, bad hands, text, error, missing fingers, extra digit, fewer digits, cropped, worst quality, low quality, normal quality, jpeg artifacts, signature, watermark, username, blurry,4-koma, sketch, (bad:1.05), error, fewer, extra, missing, worst quality, jpeg artifacts, bad quality, watermark, unfinished, displeasing, chromatic aberration, signature, extra digits, artistic error, username, scan, abstract, (blurry, lowres, low quality:1.1), ugly, (big head, bad anatomy:1.05), artist name, (watermark:1.1)
